ddls:
CREATE TABLE "temperature_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor that recorded the temperature */,
  "log_date" TEXT /* Date of the temperature reading */,
  "log_time" TEXT /* Time of the temperature reading */,
  "milliseconds" INTEGER /* Milliseconds since the epoch time */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature reading in degrees Celsius */,
  "sensor_status" TEXT /* Status of the sensor (e.g., active, maintenance, offline) */,
  "log_location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the log was recorded */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity reading in percentage */,
  "battery_level" REAL /* Battery level of the sensor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_temperature_logs_log_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("log_location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_temperature_logs_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensors" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor */,
  "sensor_name" TEXT /* Name or identifier for the sensor */,
  "location" TEXT /* Physical location of the sensor */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the sensor was installed */,
  "sensor_model" TEXT /* Model or type of the sensor */,
  "sensor_firmware_version" TEXT /* Firmware version of the sensor */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance activity */,
  "next_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the next scheduled maintenance */,
  "sensor_status" TEXT /* Current status of the sensor (e.g., active, maintenance, offline) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Full address of the location */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Contact person for the location */,
  "location_type" TEXT /* Type of location (e.g., warehouse, production floor, storage unit) */,
  "climate_control_type" TEXT /* Type of climate control system used (e.g., HVAC, refrigeration) */,
  "last_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the last inspection */,
  "next_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the next scheduled inspection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "log_id" INTEGER /* ID of the log entry that triggered the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type or severity of the alert (e.g., warning, critical) */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert was generated */,
  "alert_time" TEXT /* Time when the alert was generated */,
  "alert_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the alert */,
  "alert_status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., active, resolved, ignored) */,
  "resolved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who resolved the alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_resolved_by FOREIGN KEY ("resolved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_log_id FOREIGN KEY ("log_id") REFERENCES temperature_logs ("log_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for logging into the system */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, technician, manager) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to (e.g., maintenance, quality control, management) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time of access */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user (e.g., login, view logs) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the user accessed the system */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the system */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Unique session identifier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "temperature_thresholds" (
  "threshold_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each threshold configuration */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location for which the threshold applies */,
  "max_temperature" REAL /* Maximum allowable temperature before alerting */,
  "min_temperature" REAL /* Minimum allowable temperature before alerting */,
  "threshold_description" TEXT /* Description of the threshold configuration */,
  "threshold_status" TEXT /* Status of the threshold (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("threshold_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_temperature_thresholds_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* ID of the alert that triggered the notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date when the notification was sent */,
  "notification_time" TEXT /* Time when the notification was sent */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., email, SMS, push notification) */,
  "notification_status" TEXT /* Status of the notification (e.g., sent, failed) */,
  "sent_to" TEXT /* Contact information (e.g., email, phone number) where the notification was sent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_alert_id FOREIGN KEY ("alert_id") REFERENCES alerts ("alert_id")
)
